title: Frost King
description: Frozen Items And Mandatory Requirements : geckolib and MowziesMobs
body:
Hello everyone, 
I decided to publish the mod that my friend and I made together using MCreator. I handled most of the coding, while my friend worked on the models.

This mod was made in Turkey, and its main purpose is to make better use of the Frozen effect from Mowzie’s Mobs, which is very powerful but not really used to its full potential. Also, when playing with my friend, I couldn’t manage the effect the way I wanted, so I decided to make this mod.

Even though the mod is simple, it took me about 4–5 hours to make (and about 1 full day including breaks). If you downloaded the mod, I’d really appreciate it.

Overall, the goal of the mod was to create broader use cases and fun gameplay by using the Frozen effect from Mowzie’s Mobs — and I think I succeeded.
